judge_reason: The descriptions are inconsistent: Description A mentions a 'red X' and a stamp dated 'APR 17 1978' but Description B does not mention either, while Description B details numerous specific stamps, labels, and annotations that Description A omits entirely.
original_image_tags: A red "X" drawn over a white label in the upper right corner.
A red stamp mark that reads "BUREAU COPIED APR 17 1978 BY".
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned manila FBI file folder cover with multiple rubber-stamp markings, barcoded archive labels, and printed text including “BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION,” “DO NOT DESTROY,” and “Transfer-Call 3421.”*
